content_fingerprint: openrouter launches agent sdk for building multi turn workflows across 300 models openrouter has released an agent sdk that lets developers build multi step agent workflows with tool calls stop conditions and cost tracking across its marketplace of more than 300 models openrouter unveiled its agent sdk on april 24 2026 giving developers a unified way to build multi turn agentic workflows at the core of the sdk is a single function callmodel which converts a standard chat completion into an agent capable of executing tool calls and respecting stop conditions all with built in cost tracking the
